summary.data_limitation: iRacing .sto setup files use encrypted binary format. Individual setup parameters (ride height, spring rates, damper clicks, wing angles, camber, toe, brake bias, differential settings, tire pressures, gear stack) cannot be extracted without loading the file into the iRacing simulator. The .sto files for free Baseline+ setups have been downloaded to knowledge/majors_garage_sto/ for direct use in iRacing.
